motion_language.name: Nenek's Kitchen
motion_language.audio: Mortar and pestle grinding, slow boiling bubbles, herbal steam hiss, wooden spoon stirring
motion_language.motion: Slow grind of turmeric in stone mortar, golden jamu pouring into glass, herbal steam swirling, hands preparing traditional remedies
motion_language.language: Kampung kitchen warmth — heritage in every gesture, wisdom passed through generations
